title: A Game of Thrones
author: George R.R. Martin
synopsis: A gripping epic fantasy filled with political intrigue and deadly power struggles in the Seven Kingdoms.

title: Where the Crawdads Sing
author: Delia Owens
synopsis: A mysterious coming-of-age story set in the marshes of North Carolina, blending romance, mystery, and nature.

title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
synopsis: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever. Every book provides a chance to try another life you could have lived.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
synopsis: A memoir about a young girl who leaves her survivalist family and goes on to earn a PhD from Cambridge University.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
synopsis: A woman's act of violence against her husband—and her refusal to speak—leads a psychotherapist on a twisting search for the truth.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
synopsis: A lone astronaut must save the earth from disaster in this gripping science fiction tale of ingenuity and survival.
